level_signals: 4-7 years of experience in business operations or strategy
Embeds alongside functional leads on complex initiatives
Core member of a growing team, not a manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4-7 years of experience in business operations or strategy, ideally combining on-the-ground operating experience at a high-growth technology company with 1-2 years of management consulting, investment banking, or VC/PE

Strong interpersonal skills and professional presence, with a demonstrated ability to earn trust quickly, build consensus across competing priorities, and manage through complex, multi-stakeholder environments to reach clear outcomes
Proven ability to structure and manage complex, cross-functional initiatives from scoping through execution, maintaining momentum and delivering outcomes in a fast-moving environment

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to flex across altitudes and contexts, from working group updates with cross-functional teams to executive-level communications and presentations
Strong critical thinking skills, a first-principles mindset, and sound business judgment, with a track record of bringing structure to ambiguity and driving to clear recommendations under uncertainty
Strong analytical skills and fluency with data, with the ability to work with metrics and data to inform strategy, pressure-test assumptions, and translate findings into clear, actionable plans

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Previous operating experience at a rapidly scaling technology or AI company
employer_types_named: rapidly scaling technology or AI company

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience designing and standing up AI-native workflows
Experience implementing company-wide operational processes & systems

scope.surface: Sierra's business operations function — operating system, goal-setting, dashboards, market expansion, and cross-functional strategic initiatives
scope.business_model: B2B AI platform for customer experience
core_responsibilities: Build and run Sierra's operating system to drive visibility, accountability, and decision-making
Own the goal-setting infrastructure and leadership cadences
Design dashboards and scorecards for real-time business performance visibility
Embed AI into how the company plans and operates across functions
Lead cross-functional work to expand Sierra's presence into new segments and geographies
Act as thought partner to business leaders on complex challenges
Help define and scale world-class business operations at Sierra

green_flags: High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong credibility signals
Explicit AI-native operating culture — growth opportunity in emerging space
Broad global expansion footprint signals strong company growth trajectory
Values are clearly articulated and include work-life balance ('Family' value)
Equity participation mentioned for full-time employees
JD encourages applicants even if experience doesn't precisely match
red_flags: Primarily in-person in San Francisco — eliminates remote candidates
Visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD
Role scope is broad and somewhat vague — multiple distinct functions bundled together without clear prioritization

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range 4-7 and IC framing)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'primarily an in-person company based in San Francisco')
compensation.equity_form (inferred; JD says 'equity plans' without specifying form)
ambiguities: Years range '4-7 years' with 'ideally combining...with 1-2 years of management consulting, investment banking, or VC/PE' — the consulting/banking/VC qualifier reads as preferred ('ideally') but sits within the must-have experience block; treated as a strong preference rather than hard requirement
Visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere; set to 'unclear'
Role could span Chief of Staff functions and BizOps — classified as BizOps/Strategy & Ops with Chief of Staff as secondary archetype
